text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is talking to a younger student during
a break from training.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Oguri. See you later!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've always struggled with putting my thoughts
into words, but lately, I think I've been doing a
bit better.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's probably why more and more people are
coming to me for advice.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I've improved because you always listen
carefully to what I have to say... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's shy smile reminds me once again of
how happy I am to be her trainer.
